name: collie
description: Reusable Codex plugin for installing and using Collie for fast index-backed code search.

interface.shortDescription: Install Collie and use indexed code search from Codex.
interface.longDescription: Installs or upgrades the latest published Collie CLI, then gives Codex a reusable skill for fast token, symbol, and regex search over local repositories.
defaultPrompt: Set up Collie in this repository.
Use Collie to find the code paths that implement this feature.
Use Collie JSON output to search this repo before editing code.
